nasb.text: For Ezra had set his heart to study the law of the Lord and to practice it, and to teach His statutes and ordinances in Israel.

esv.text: For Ezra had set his heart to study the Law of the Lord, and to do it and to teach his statutes and rules in Israel.

cnv.text: 因為以斯拉專心尋求研究耶和華的律法，並且遵行，在以色列中教導律例和典章。

ccb.text: 以斯拉定意研读、遵行耶和华的律法，并在以色列教导律例和典章。
